metadata.rule: Developers / oxidants are excluded. Analysis includes color shades, lighteners, mixers/correctors, and bond/color support products.

stylistProfile.title: Sharon Mor – 2025
stylistProfile.signatureBehavior: Concentrated formulation behavior around a smaller set of repeatable color choices.
stylistProfile.summary: Sharon Mor in 2025 is primarily oriented around color maintenance and coverage services, with L'OREAL PROFESSIONNEL, TO DEL. driving most recorded color usage.
